name: Fruits of Fury
author: Poki
description: Fruits of Fury is an action game where you become a fearless ninja battling evil fruits! Protect your watering can, slash through waves of furious produce, and unleash epic ninja skills to turn them into juice! Level up your abilities, grab powerful upgrades, and keep the fruit invasion at bay. Ready to slice, dice, and conquer the fruity fury? Let’s get juicing How to play Fruits of Fury? Left click to attack. Later you will unlock all kinds of skills during the battle, and you can press according keys to use them. Who created Fruits of Fury? Fruits of Fury is created by berru & para. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Fruits of Fury for free? You can play Fruits of Fury for free on Poki. Can I play Fruits of Fury on mobile devices and desktop? Fruits of Fury can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
